episode.title: Koko and Hoppy 🐰 Hoppy's Secret Garden | English Bedtime Story | Koko's Forest Adventure

email.subject: Koko and Hoppy discover a secret garden
email.previewText: A gentle story about curiosity, bravery, and three simple English words to practice together.
email.richTextBody:
Koko's Forest - EP006

Hoppy's Secret Garden

This week, Koko and Hoppy follow a hidden path behind the big oak tree. Hoppy feels curious and a little nervous, so Koko stays by her side. Together they discover glowing flowers, dancing fireflies, and a calm reminder that bravery can begin with one small step.

Learning words
garden - GAR-den
花園
Hoppy found a secret garden.

discover - dis-KUH-ver
發現
Koko and Hoppy discover glowing flowers.

wonder - WUN-der
驚奇
They looked at the fireflies with wonder.

Parent activity
After watching, invite your child to draw a tiny secret garden. Ask: What would you discover there? Then practice one sentence together: I can discover something beautiful.

Watch the episode with your child: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=NW_RHZDPKUU
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=NW_RHZDPKUU

For more Koko parent resources and bilingual learning ideas, visit https://fursay.com/koko
https://fursay.com/koko?subscribe=koko&utm_source=creator_kit&utm_medium=description&utm_campaign=koko_story_funnel&utm_content=creator_kit_sample

Koko's Forest Adventure weekly pack is ready for family story time: https://fursay.com/creator/koko/newsletter
https://fursay.com/creator/koko/newsletter

Curiosity grows when children feel safe to explore. This story is a soft way to practice courage, friendship, and wonder before bedtime.
